out_of_scope_note: Public-goods / common-pool-resource social dilemma study using deep RL to design a resource-allocation mechanism for human players in an iterated multiplayer trust game. Explicitly enumerated OOS category in synopsis_prompt: 'Social science / economics / public-goods games / collective intelligence experiments without neural recording or computational model of the brain.' The RL agent is a social planner optimizing aggregate human payoff, not a model of brain function; no neural data, no perceptual/encoding/decision-circuit claim.
